## Summary

Describe the change and the user-visible impact.

## Testing

- [ ] `python -m unittest`

## Documentation

- [ ] Updated `README.md` for user-facing behavior changes
- [ ] Updated relevant `wiki/user/` pages and `wiki/user/log.md` for architecture or workflow changes

## Checklist

- [ ] Added or updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] Did not commit generated or runtime artifacts
